description: Get a single publisher profile by its DID. EXPERIMENTAL.

main.description: Returns the aggregator's view of one publisher, including the signed publisher.profile record (identity-level contact channels, display name, description) and any hydrated labels. Returns NotFound if the aggregator has no profile indexed for this DID, or if the publisher has been tombstoned.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No publisher profile indexed under the given DID. Aggregators that hard-delete on publisher deletion (rather than soft-deleting) return NotFound for both the never-indexed and the deleted cases — clients should treat them equivalently.
